subject: fix(structure): remove dead code in insertCell and unused cellLabel variable
body:
insertCell built a newSubSizes array with splice that was immediately
overridden by the redistributed array. Removed the unused intermediate.
Also removed cellLabel variable that was always 'Cell' regardless of
layout type — replaced with string literal.

Tags: structure, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: layout-structure-controls
Semver: patch
